Petition For Declaratory Relief For An Accounting For Order Instructing Trustee To Make Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together:
1) PTR-12-296277, Edward Hee & Bernadette Hee Trust; and
2) PTR-20-303887, Bernadette Woo Hee Living Trust.

Appearances:
Edward Koplowitz appeared for petitioner Linda Hee in the Bernadette Living Trust matter (via Zoom).
Lynn Searle appeared for petitioner Linda Hee in the Edward & Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).
Ciaran O'Sullivan appeared for respondent Brian Hee in the Edward & Bernadatte Hee Trust matter.
Bruce Feder appeared for trustee Gloria Kwei in the Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).
John Minton appeared for beneficiaries Alessandra Hee, Arianna Hee and Isabella Hee in the Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).
Lillian Ng appeared to report status regarding accountings (via Zoom).

The Court inquired as to the status of the case. Counsel reported that the parties had scheduled a mediation session in both matters for January 28, 2026 with Judge Adams. Mr. Koplowitz stated that the parties may schedule a 2nd mediation session with Judge Adams if necessary. He requested the issuance of a Breslin order to ensure that any settlement reached at mediation would be binding on all interested parties. The Court agreed to issue a Breslin order covering both matters.

Mr. Koplowitz also requested tolling of the five-year statute to ensure parties would not be prejudiced by participating in mediation. Mr. O'Sullivan opposed tolling, and argued that the Court lacked authority to order tolling absent party stipulation. The Court declined to enter a tolling order.

Following discussion, the Court continued both matters and set a status hearing on mediation for February 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Ms. Ng confirmed an accounting for the Edward Hee Trust was submitted to the parties on October 22, 2025, covering May 2014 to 2022. She stated that work was ongoing to complete the 2022-2025 accounting and anticipated completion in early January 2026.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Declaratory Relief For An Accounting For Order Instructing Trustee To Make Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together:
1) PTR-20-303887, Bernadette Woo Hee Living Trust; and
2) PTR-12-296277, Edward Hee & Bernadette Hee Trust.

Appearances:
Edward Koplowitz appeared for petitioner Linda Hee in the Bernadette Living Trust matter (via CourtCall).
Lynn Searle appeared for petitioner Linda Hee in the Edward & Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).
Ciaran O'Sullivan appeared for respondent Brian Hee in the Edward & Bernadatte Hee Trust matter.
Bruce Feder appeared for trustee Gloria Kwei in the Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).
John Minton appeared for beneficiaries Alessandra Hee, Arianna Hee and Isabella Hee in the Bernadette Hee Trust matter (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding ADR and discovery needed for a meaningful mediation. Mr. O'Sullivan argued mediation required production of accounting materials in their native format for his forensic accountant and requested a trustee accounting from 2014 to the present. Ms. Searle maintained that everything being requested had already been provided, and reported that a separate trustee accounting was being prepared with the assistance of attorney Lillian Ng.

The Court directed the parties to meet and confer to resolve accounting and discovery issues.

Mr. Minton stated that he was recently retained to represent beneficiaries Alessandra, Arianna and Isabella Hee and was familiarizing himself with both cases. Counsel discussed whether the Bernadette Hee Trust matter should continue to trail the Edward & Bernadette matter or proceed on its own path, now that the beneficiaries are represented.

Following discussion, the Court continued both matters to November 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and added a status hearing for the same date to address discovery and accounting for 2014 to the present.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition 1. For Declaratory Relief Whether Part Of The Trust Terms Are Invalid 2. To Compel An Accounting And 3. For Distribution Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz, via Zoom, for Linda Hee, Petitioner; Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Gloria Kwei, Trustee in related matter.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to take the instant petition off calendar. Mr. Koplowitz reports on his position regarding this matter and advises that it will not be able to be determined until the related matter is resolved. Mr. Feder agrees with Mr. Koplowitz' report and advises that he does not object to the court's tentative ruling.

The Petition for Declaratory Relief, etc., is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition 1. For Declaratory Relief Whether Part Of The Trust Terms Are Invalid 2. To Compel An Accounting And 3. For Distribution Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerard Launay, via Zoom, for and with Linda Hee, Petitioner; Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Bernadette Hee, Trustee in related matter.

The court recaps the previous calling of this matter where the court advised of its intent to allow one additional continuance to today's date and that if the matter had not developed, the court would consider taking the petition off calendar. Mr. Launay offers advocacy to keep the matter on calendar. Mr. Feder offers his position regarding this matter and the issues caused with the delay with the adjudicating the forensic accounting in the related matter which is currently set for a status hearing regarding the same on Sep-12-2022. Mr. Feder suggests continuing this matter to some time after that date. Mr. Launay suggests continuing this matter to allow the parties enough time to review the forensic accounting in the related matter and subsequent settlement discussions.

The matter is continued to Dec-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition 1. For Declaratory Relief Whether Part Of The Trust Terms Are Invalid 2. To Compel An Accounting And 3. For Distribution Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Continued To Aug-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gerard Launay, via Zoom, for Linda Hee, Petitioner; Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Bernadette Hee, Trustor in related case.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling to take this petition off calendar and have it refiled once the matter is ready as the court is not inclined to carry the petition as long as it has. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the court keeping this petition on calendar until the related matter, set for hearing on Jul-20-2022, has been resolved.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises counsel that this is the final continuance that it intends to grant in this matter.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.
